title: Senior Doctor - Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
